title: centaurea × ternilli
intro: Centaurea × ternilli, also known as Terni Cornflower, is a hybrid species of the Centaurea genus, a type of flowering plant. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Centaurea × ternilli include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. Centaurea × ternilli can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
